title: The Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Act, 1969
full_text: The Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Act, 1969 खुदाबख्शओरियंटलपब्लिकलाइब्रेरीअधिनियम, 1969 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1969-43 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 1969-12-26 Act Year: 1969 Short Title: The Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library Act, 1969 Hindi Title: खुदाबख्शओरियंटलपब्लिकलाइब्रेरीअधिनियम, 1969 Long Title: An Act to declare the Khuda Bakhsh Oriental Public Library at Patna to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its administration and certain other connected matters. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 21-07-1970 Notification: 21st July, 1970, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1255(E), dated 17th July, 1970, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
